Aburame Torune (S)

Naruto Arena > Game manual > Characters and Skills > Aburame Torune (S)

Naruto-Arena forces you to select 3 characters when you start a new game. This page gives you an overview of all characters available in the Naruto-Arena game. Not only can you view each character's skills, you can also discuss the characters by posting comments.

 Aburame Torune (S)
A member of the Aburame clan, and a member of Anbu Root, Torune can almost be said to have no personality of his own, other than his undying loyalty to Danzo. Unlike other members of his clan, Torune employs a unique type of bug that lets him outright destroy both flesh and chakra.
Requirement to unlock: Mission: The Aburame Shadow
 Skill: Armor of Venom
Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy and gains 15 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to one enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.
 Cooldown: None
Chakra required: 
 Classes: Chakra, Affliction, Melee, Unique, Instant.
 Skill: Jar of Poison
Torune applies one 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy and gains 35 destructible defense. During this time, Torune can use this skill again for 1 random to apply a 'Venom Beetle' to each enemy. The enemy that destroys this destructible defense will have a 'Venom Beetle' applied to them.
 Cooldown: None
Chakra required: 
 Classes: Chakra, Affliction, Melee, Unique, Instant.
 Skill: Venom Explosion
Torune targets any enemy affected by at least one 'Venom Beetle', removing 1 random chakra from them for each 'Venom Beetle' on them.
 Cooldown: 2
Chakra required: 
 Classes: Chakra, Affliction, Melee, Unique, Instant.
 Skill: Super Leap
This skill makes Aburame Torune (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
 Cooldown: 4
Chakra required: 
 Classes: Physical, Instant.
 Skill: Venom Beetle
This skill deals 5 affliction damage permanently.
 Cooldown: None
Chakra required: None
 Classes: Chakra, Affliction, Melee, Instant, Unique.
